response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (0.40) is below our minimum sharing threshold (0.50), and our islanded state with declining reserves requires full self-preservation to maintain grid stability; sharing would accelerate our depletion without reconnection confirmation.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
